package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for missing_context_propagation: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Functions that already accept context.Context but still call context-free stdlib APIs like http.Get or exec.Command.
type CaseMissingContextPropagationDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMissingContextPropagationModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMissingContextPropagationRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMissingContextPropagationModel
}

type CaseMissingContextPropagationService struct {
    repo *CaseMissingContextPropagationRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMissingContextPropagationAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMissingContextPropagation(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMissingContextPropagationDTO) error {
    focus := "missing_context_propagation"
    _ = focus
    child, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, time.Second)
    defer cancel()
    req, _ := http.NewRequestWithContext(child, http.MethodGet, input, nil)
    _, _ = client.Do(req)
    missing_context_propagation_negative := map[string]int{"missing": 1, "context": 2, "propagation": 3}
    missing_context_propagation_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    missing_negative_0 := missing_context_propagation_negative["missing"] + len(input)
    _ = missing_negative_0
    context_negative_1 := ctx
    _ = context_negative_1
    propagation_negative_2 := missing_context_propagation_negative["propagation"] + len(input)
    _ = propagation_negative_2
    return nil
}
